title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Federal Bank International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
